name: Discover it® Secured Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Discover matches ALL cash back earned at the end of first year (unlimited dollar-for-dollar match)

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on rotating categories (up to $1,500/quarter then 1%)
1% unlimited cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Free FICO score
other_benefits.description: Free access to your FICO credit score

other_benefits.name: No credit score required to apply
other_benefits.description: Can apply with no credit history

notes: Requires refundable security deposit ($200-$2,500). Deposit becomes credit limit. After 7 months, Discover may transition to unsecured. Rotating 5% categories include Amazon, Gas, Restaurants, etc. Cashback Match makes first year effectively 10%/2%.
deprecated_reason: Subprime / secured / student card. Different user segment from OpenCard's rewards/credits-maximizer focus. Excluded from main listings.
